title: Security Schema
description: Schema for defining application security settings

authentication_required.description: Whether authentication is required to access the application

allow.description: Whether users can self-register via the login page (requires email confirmation)

role.description: The default role assigned to new registered users

roles.description: Initial roles to seed. If not provided and authentication is required, 'admin' and 'user' roles are created by default.

profile_concept.description: Business concept used as the per-user profile for this role. The generator links profile rows to auth users at login.

users.description: Initial users to seed. If not provided and authentication is required, default users 'admin@test.com' and 'user@test.com' are created.

sso.description: SSO (Kerberos/OIDC via Keycloak) configuration for single sign-on login

domain.description: Kerberos realm / email domain for SSO users (e.g. 'dev.local')

role_claim.description: Name of the JWT claim containing the user role(s) from the SSO provider

default_role.description: Role assigned when no matching role is found in the SSO claim

rules_level_1.description: General security rules for role-based access control. Lower priority.

rules_level_2.description: Specific security rules for role-based access control. Medium priority.

rules_level_3.description: Exception security rules for role-based access control. High priority.

role.description: Role name (e.g., 'admin', 'user'). Use '_anon' for unauthenticated (anonymous) access — only 'read' is allowed for this built-in role.

field.description: Field name or '*' for all fields
